summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control dashboard iteration 4. All 15 requested features tested and working correctly. Cowork task navigation, Code terminal features, Chat model selector, Dashboard/Jobs/Approvals pages, and navigation all functional.
passed_tests: Cowork page: clicking task card navigates to Chat (/) with prompt pre-filled in textarea
Cowork page: category filter tabs (All, Schedule, Create, Analyze, Organize, Communicate) filter task cards correctly - Schedule shows 2 tasks, All shows 21 tasks
Cowork page: search input filters tasks by title - 'spreadsheet' search shows 2 matching tasks
Code page: terminal starts clean with lobster mascot splash (no mock sessions)
Code page: typing command 'ls -la' and pressing Enter executes and shows output (Documents, Downloads, Desktop, Projects, .config)
Code page: Clear button clears terminal output and restores lobster mascot splash
Code page: Bypass permissions toggle switches between 'Bypass permissions' (locked) and 'Permissions bypassed' (unlocked with red styling)
Code page: Local/Remote toggle switches between 'Local' and 'Remote' mode
Chat page: model selector dropdown opens and shows 9 providers (anthropic, openai, google, meta-llama, deepseek, nvidia, mistral, qwen, openrouter)
Chat page: selecting provider shows models with cost tier badges ($$) and capability icons
Chat page: sending message produces simulated response with streaming animation
Dashboard page: shows stats grid (Active Jobs: 2, Pending Approvals: 2, Connectors: 5/6, Gateway: connecting)
Dashboard page: shows Active Model section and Recent Events section
Jobs page: displays 4 job cards with status indicators (Running, Completed, Pending)
Jobs page: shows progress bars for running jobs (65% and 30% complete)
Jobs page: cancel button visible for running jobs (2 cancel buttons found)
Approvals page: shows 4 approval cards with descriptions and risk levels (low, medium, high)
Approvals page: Approve/Reject buttons visible for pending items (2 of each)
Approvals page: clicking Approve button works (state management functional)
Navigation: all sidebar links navigate correctly (Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
Navigation: top tabs (Chat/Cowork/Code) navigate correctly to respective pages
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 requested features tested and working. The app is frontend-only with all state managed by Zustand store in useGateway.js. Mock data includes: 4 jobs (2 running, 1 completed, 1 pending), 4 approvals (2 pending, 1 approved, 1 rejected), 21 cowork tasks across 6 categories. Terminal commands are simulated with mock responses. Chat messages use simulated streaming responses.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), cancelJob (state update), approveRequest/rejectRequest (state update)
